ogTitle: St Ives Chase vs St Leonards: Climate Safety

heading: St Ives Chase vs St Leonards — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between St Ives Chase, New South Wales and St Leonards, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: St Ives Chase and St Leonards have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is St Ives Chase or St Leonards safer from flooding?
faq.answer: St Ives Chase has a flood risk score of 22/100, while St Leonards scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: St Ives Chase scores 17/100 for bushfire risk. St Leonards scores 35/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in St Ives Chase or St Leonards?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. St Ives Chase has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
